items.title: ASC has 8 unscheduled days in next 14d
ASC: 3 scheduled slot(s) past their fire time
items.detail: Tracker says scheduled but scheduled_for is in the past. With API live, run `python scripts/reconcile_past_fire.py --niche asc` to auto-fix. First few: #44 (2026-05-16 12:00, 44.4h ago), #52 (2026-05-14 11:00, 93.4h ago), #54 (2026-05-15 11:00, 69.4h ago).
